# Utilities (Electricity, Water, Transport) — Madhya Pradesh (18 Portals)

## Electricity (10 Portals)

| # | Portal | URL | Description |
|---|--------|-----|-------------|
| 1 | MPPGCL (Power Generation) | https://www.mppgcl.mp.gov.in | State electricity generation company |
| 2 | MPPTCL (Power Transmission) | https://www.mptransco.in | State electricity transmission utility |
| 3 | MPPMCL (Power Management) | https://www.mppmcl.com | Power trading and management company |
| 4 | Central Zone Discom (Bhopal) | https://portal.mpcz.in | Electricity distribution — Central MP, Bhopal zone |
| 5 | Eastern Zone Discom (Jabalpur) | https://billing.mpez.co.in | Electricity distribution — Eastern MP, Jabalpur zone |
| 6 | Western Zone Discom (Indore) | https://www.mpwz.co.in | Electricity distribution — Western MP, Indore zone |
| 7 | MP Electricity Regulatory Commission | https://mperc.in | Regulates electricity tariff and sector |
| 8 | Saral Sanyojan (New Connections) | https://saralsanyojan.mpcz.in | New electricity connection application portal |
| 9 | UPay Electricity Bill Pay | https://resourceutils.mpcz.in:8090/payBill | Online electricity bill payment |

## Water (4 Portals)

| # | Portal | URL | Description |
|---|--------|-----|-------------|
| 1 | MP Jal Nigam | https://mpjalnigam.mp.gov.in | Urban water supply and sewerage |
| 2 | Jal Samagra | https://jalsamagra.mp.gov.in | Rural and urban water supply schemes |
| 3 | PHED MP (Rural Water) | https://www.phed.mp.gov.in | Public Health Engineering — rural water supply |
| 4 | e-Nagar Palika (Water) | https://enagarpalika.mp.gov.in | Municipal water supply services via ULB portal |

## Transport (5 Portals)

| # | Portal | URL | Description |
|---|--------|-----|-------------|
| 1 | MP Transport Department | https://mptransport.org | Vehicle registration, driving licenses, road transport |
| 2 | MP Transport MIS | http://mis.mptransport.org | Transport Management Information System |
| 3 | MP e-Parivahan | http://eparivahan.mptransport.org | Online vehicle and license services |
| 4 | Sarathi (License via MPOnline) | https://sarathi.mponline.gov.in | Driving license services via MPOnline |
| 5 | National Parivahan | https://parivahan.gov.in | National road transport services portal |

## Quick Reference: How to Pay Electricity Bill
- **Bhopal/Central Zone**: portal.mpcz.in
- **Jabalpur/Eastern Zone**: billing.mpez.co.in
- **Indore/Western Zone**: mpwz.co.in
- **Mobile App**: UPay (com.mpmkvvcl.upay)
